description: Import these sensors into Tanium via Content → Import. They extend Tanium's native visibility for ransomware-specific data collection.

sensors.name: DRRA - File Write Entropy Score
sensors.description: Calculates Shannon entropy of recently written files. Returns files with entropy above 0.85 (encryption indicator). Run against all endpoints every 5 minutes.

sensors.name: DRRA - Ransomware Extension Count
sensors.description: Counts files with known ransomware extensions in user directories. Nonzero result indicates active or completed encryption.

sensors.name: DRRA - Shadow Copy Count
sensors.description: Returns the number of Volume Shadow Copies available. Zero copies indicates VSS deletion has occurred.

sensors.name: DRRA - Ransom Note Presence
sensors.description: Checks for ransom note filenames in common user directories.

sensors.name: DRRA - Suspicious Outbound Connections
sensors.description: Lists active outbound TCP connections to uncommon ports (potential C2 beaconing).

sensors.name: DRRA - Backup Service Status
sensors.description: Checks status of Windows Backup and VSS services. Disabled services may indicate ransomware tampering.
